ddls:
CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the object */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of the object (e.g., person, place, thing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the object */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the object (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the object */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the object was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the object was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object the metadata is associated with */,
  "property" TEXT /* Property being described (e.g., attributed name, naming authority) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the value (e.g., string, integer, date) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metadata (e.g., API, manual input) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the metadata (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_property FOREIGN KEY ("property") REFERENCES properties ("property_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the property value */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the property */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the property (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "object_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first object in the relationship */,
  "object_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second object in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., parent-child, sibling) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the relationship (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_relationships_object_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("object_id_1") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_relationships_object_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("object_id_2") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control rule */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the rule applies to */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object the rule applies to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., read, write) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the access control rule (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access control rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access control rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., string, integer, date) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the data type (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the rule applies to */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of validation rule (e.g., required, pattern) */,
  "rule_value" TEXT /* Value of the validation rule */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the validation rule (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the validation rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the validation rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_rules_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
